name: Zscaler
description: Manage Zscaler cloud security platform including ZPA (private access), ZIA (internet access), ZDX (digital experience), ZCC (client connector), EASM (attack surface), and Z-Insights (analytics). Create and manage policies, troubleshoot connectivity, audit security configurations, and investigate incidents across the full Zscaler ecosystem.

env.name: ZSCALER_CLIENT_ID
env.description: Zscaler value for zscaler client id.

env.name: ZSCALER_CLIENT_SECRET
env.description: Zscaler value for zscaler client secret.

env.name: ZSCALER_CUSTOMER_ID
env.description: Zscaler value for zscaler customer id.

env.name: ZSCALER_VANITY_DOMAIN
env.description: Zscaler value for zscaler vanity domain.

install.notes: The `zscaler-mcp-server` CLI must be available on PATH before starting this MCP server.
